Orthoderivative¶

Orthoderivative of quadratic APN (n,n)-functions

IntToSequence, IntToElt, getConvertionFunction

 1Orthoderivative:=function(F : anf:=false)
 2    if anf then
 3        n:=#F;
 4        D:=getConvertionFunction(n: vector:=true);
 5        TT:=[([Evaluate(F[j],D[i]): i in [0..(2^n-1)]]): j in [1..n]];
 6    else
 7        K:=BaseRing(Parent(F));
 8        n:=Degree(K);
 9        a:=K.1;
10        D:=getConvertionFunction(n);
11        TT:=[([Trace(a^j *Evaluate(F,D[i])): i in [0..(2^n-1)]]): j in [0..(n-1)]];
12    end if;
13    p:=AssociativeArray();
14    p[D[0]]:=D[0];
15    for k:=1 to (2^n-1) do
16        J:=ZeroMatrix(GF(2),n,n);
17        xk:=[BitwiseXor(k,2^i): i in [0..(n-1)]];
18        for j:=1 to n do
19            Tj:=TT[j];
20            for i:=1 to n do
21                J[j][i]:=Tj[xk[i]+1 ]+Tj[k+1]+Tj[2^(i-1)+1]+Tj[1];
22            end for;
23        end for;
24        v:=Rep(Generators(Kernel(J)));
25        if anf then
26            p[D[k]]:=Eltseq(v);
27        else
28            p[D[k]]:=D[Seqint([Integers()!v[i]: i in [1..n]],2)];
29        end if;
30    end for;
31    return p;
32end function;
